behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files (tests/library/browsercontext-fetch.spec.ts and tests/bidi/expectations/moz-firefox-nightly-library.txt) and the test title used in assertions.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (BiDi case not handled) without specifying the exact code change or variable names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_bidi_cookie_rejection_condition requires the exact pattern '|| isBidi' OR-combined with chromium on a single line; an equivalent fix like a separate `if (isBidi && value==='None')` branch or reordering to `isBidi || browserName==='chromium'` would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests also run npm build, eslint, tsc, generate_channels, etc. as subprocesses, beyond just text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require specific code additions (isBidi in signature, OR-combined condition, removal of expectation line) which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both required behaviors (update test logic for BiDi, remove expectation entry) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code/test fix, not structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the right files but doesn't give the exact line fix; localization to 'around line 1155' is acceptable guidance.
